title: Hardening Guide - Scheduler Configuration — Scheduler networking command line options
text:
bind-address
: In most cases, the kube-scheduler does not need to be externally accessible.
Setting the bind address to
localhost
is a secure practice.
permit-address-sharing
: Set this to
false
to disable connection sharing through
SO_REUSEADDR
.
SO_REUSEADDR
can lead to reuse of terminated connections that are in
TIME_WAIT
state.
permit-port-sharing
: Default
false
. Use the default unless you are confident you understand the security implications.
